system.notes:
CH-19 'Crazy Harry' commercial sniper satellite (ortillery) from the Neo-Soviet Rocket Korps: a simple orbital box launcher.

Carries 30 rounds (single-use launcher): ten 'crowbar' (5kg kinetic penetrator, automatically defeats any armor, 40% chance to disable any vehicle smaller than a naval vessel, kills any person hit); ten 'frag' (frangible, 10D6AP to everything within 50m radius); ten 'bomb' (time-delayed hi-ex penetrator, punches into a building and devastates three floors, 5D10 blast to everything within 20m). Fire control: CzechElec INT 2 computer with pseudo-intelligent targeting, GPS array and optics; 95% accuracy. Works in the 100 x 30 mile orbit band. Cost 900,000 eb (not counting launch vehicle).

The book prints no standard vehicle armor/SDP/speed for the satellite; only the cost, round loadout and accuracy above are captured. [Firestorm: Shockwave p.56]
